summary: Australia's political landscape is shifting as the Coalition fends off One Nation challenges across multiple states, with Victorian Liberal leaders notably refusing to rule out future deals. In tragedy, a Sydney man has been arrested over the alleged killing of his parents and brother in a violent home attack, while a coroner has found systemic failures in emergency response that may have contributed to another death. On lighter notes, an Australian relay team has equalled the national record and a stranded humpback whale named Timmy has been successfully released in the North Sea following an international rescue effort.

articles.title: Military plane makes emergency landing at outback airport
articles.desc: The C-27J Spartan aircraft took off from Darwin, and the ABC understood it was heading towards Brisbane and near Longreach when personnel observed "signs of smoke" onboard.

articles.title: The sea is coming for this coastal town, but the land tax kept rising
articles.desc: A Phillip Island community whose land it being reclaimed by the ocean a rate of six metres a year has successfully fought unfair land tax bills.

articles.title: WA farmer who died fighting bushfire honoured at Kings Park memorial
